CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-29-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-18-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
David Perry, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Wells Fargo Bank, National Association.
Order waiving live testimony of witness is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Suresh Patel as follows:
Damages $284,129.08
Prejudgment Interest $33,302.30
Attorney's Fees $2,825.00
Costs $410.00, for a total of $320,666.38
Judgment signed in open court.

Ex Parte Request To Have Witness Appear By Decl. And Have Live Testimony Waived At Default Prove-Up Hearing
